mapper.select: SELECT TEI.MSDS_ID, TEI.COMP_ID, TEI.MSDS_NM, TEI.MSDS_SYNONYM, TEI.CAS_NO, TEI.DAILY_VOLUME, TEI.DAILY_VOLUME_UNIT, TEI.DAILY_TIME, TEI."desc", TEI.ORD_SEQ, TEI.USE_YN, TEI.CREATED_AT, TEI.CREATED_BY, TEI.UPDATED_AT, TEI.UPDATED_BY, SF.FILE_ID AS FILE_ID FROM ESG.TB_MSDS_INFO TEI -- 파일 LEFT JOIN ESG.TB_SYS_FILE SF ON SF.TARGET_ID = TEI.MSDS_ID AND SF.TARGET_TYPE='msds' WHERE 1=1 AND TEI.COMP_ID = #{compId} ORDER BY TEI.USE_YN DESC, TEI.ORD_SEQ ASC, TEI.CREATED_AT ASC

SELECT TEI.MSDS_ID, TEI.COMP_ID, TEI.MSDS_NM, TEI.MSDS_SYNONYM, TEI.CAS_NO, TEI.DAILY_VOLUME, TEI.DAILY_VOLUME_UNIT, TEI.DAILY_TIME, TEI."desc", TEI.ORD_SEQ, TEI.USE_YN, TEI.CREATED_AT, TEI.CREATED_BY, TEI.UPDATED_AT, TEI.UPDATED_BY, SF.FILE_ID AS FILE_ID FROM ESG.TB_MSDS_INFO TEI -- 파일 LEFT JOIN ESG.TB_SYS_FILE SF ON SF.TARGET_ID = TEI.MSDS_ID AND SF.TARGET_TYPE='msds' WHERE TEI.MSDS_ID = #{searchText};
SELECT MSDS_ID, MSDS_ITEM_CODE, MSDS_ITEM_NAME_KOR, ITEM_DETAIL, ITEM_DETAIL AS id, ITEM_DETAIL AS nm FROM ESG.TB_MSDS_INFO_LAW WHERE MSDS_ID = #{searchText} AND MSDS_ITEM_CODE = #{searchCd}
SELECT MSDS_ID, HR_ID, HR_NM, ORGN_NM, JBRP_NM, HR_ID AS id, HR_NM AS nm FROM ESG.TB_MSDS_INFO_HR WHERE MSDS_ID = #{searchText}
mapper.insert:
SELECT TO_CHAR(now(), 'YYYYMMDD') || LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(MSDS_ID, 9)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') as MSDS_ID FROM ESG.TB_MSDS_INFO WHERE SUBSTRING(MSDS_ID,1,8) = TO_CHAR(now(), 'YYYYMMDD')
INSERT INTO ESG.TB_MSDS_INFO ( MSDS_ID, COMP_ID, MSDS_NM, MSDS_SYNONYM, CAS_NO, DAILY_VOLUME, DAILY_VOLUME_UNIT, DAILY_TIME, "desc", ORD_SEQ, USE_YN, CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY ) VALUES ( #{msdsId}, #{compId}, #{msdsNm}, #{msdsSynonym}, #{casNo}, cast(#{dailyVolume} as float), #{dailyVolumeUnit}, cast(#{dailyTime} as float), #{desc}, #{ordSeq}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE ESG.TB_MSDS_INFO SET MSDS_NM = #{msdsNm}, MSDS_SYNONYM = #{msdsSynonym}, CAS_NO = #{casNo}, DAILY_VOLUME = cast(#{dailyVolume} as float), DAILY_VOLUME_UNIT = #{dailyVolumeUnit}, DAILY_TIME = cast(#{dailyTime} as float), "desc" = #{desc}, ORD_SEQ = #{ordSeq}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, UPDATED_AT = now(), UPDATED_BY = #{updatedBy} WHERE MSDS_ID = #{msdsId}
mapper.select: SELECT MSDS_ID, COMP_ID, MSDS_NM, MSDS_SYNONYM, CAS_NO, DAILY_VOLUME, DAILY_VOLUME_UNIT, DAILY_TIME, "desc", ORD_SEQ, USE_YN, CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY, UPDATED_AT, UPDATED_BY FROM ESG.TB_MSDS_INFO WHERE 1=1 AND MSDS_ID = #{msdsId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ESG.TB_MSDS_INFO_LAW ( MSDS_ID, MSDS_ITEM_CODE, MSDS_ITEM_NAME_KOR, ITEM_DETAIL, CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY ) VALUES ( #{msdsId}, #{msdsItemCode}, #{msdsItemNameKor}, #{itemDetail}, now(), #{createdBy} )
INSERT INTO ESG.TB_MSDS_INFO_HR ( MSDS_ID, HR_ID, HR_NM, ORGN_NM, JBRP_NM, CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY ) VALUES ( #{msdsId}, #{hrId}, #{hrNm}, #{orgnNm}, #{jbrpNm}, now(), #{createdBy} )
